pool_worker.py::KVPoolWorker.register_kv_caches(self, kv_caches)  # 注册显存(base_addr/stride) + 起 send/recv 后台线程
pool_worker.py::KVPoolWorker.lookup_scheduler(self, ...)  # 持 m_store，真正 m_store.exists 查池，回命中长度（LookupKeyServer 转交点）
kv_transfer.py::class KVTransferThread(threading.Thread)  # ★搬运线程基类。request_queue 单消费者 while 循环，把『谁来搬』(后台线程)与『谁要搬』(主循环 add_request)解耦；子类实现 _handle_request
kv_transfer.py::KVTransferThread.add_request(self, request: ReqMeta)  # 主循环侧入队（生产者）
kv_transfer.py::class KVCacheStoreSendingThread(KVTransferThread)  # save/put 线程：process_tokens 生成 key→lookup 去重(跨请求只存一次)→仅 missing 块 prepare_value 取(addr,size)→m_store.put→task_done 解 join
kv_transfer.py::class KVCacheStoreRecvingThread(KVTransferThread)  # async load/get 线程：组 key/addr/size→m_store.get→失败块 record_failed_blocks 记 _invalid_block_ids→set_finished_request
backend/backend.py::class Backend(ABC)  # ★可插拔后端契约。6 抽象方法：set_device / register_buffer(ptrs,lengths) / exists(keys)->list[int] / put(keys,addrs,sizes) / get(keys,addrs,sizes)
backend/mooncake_backend.py::class MooncakeBackend(Backend)  # 代表后端实现：_setup_store 连 Mooncake 分布式 KV store；put/get 经 batch_*_into_multi_buffers，异常 try/except 吞为记日志（cpu_offload/lmcache/ucm 等同契约旁路）
ch12: vllm_ascend/kv_offload/npu.py::class NPUOffloadingSpec(OffloadingSpec)  # 工厂式 spec：调度端 get_manager()->CPUOffloadingManager、worker 端 get_handlers()->CpuNpuOffloadingHandler；持双侧公共配置(num_cpu_blocks/block_size_factor)，精简版固定 enable_events=False

vllm_ascend/kv_offload/cpu_npu.py::CpuNpuOffloadingHandler.transfer_async(job_id: int, spec: TransferSpec) -> bool  # 标准路径 device<->host 异步分层搬运节拍：判方向->expand_block_ids->拼指针->torch.npu.stream 流序编排(wait_stream/wait_event/deque)->swap_blocks_batch
vllm_ascend/kv_offload/cpu_npu.py::CpuNpuOffloadingHandler.get_finished() -> list[TransferResult]  # Event.query() 非阻塞轮询完成；对照 wait(job_ids) 用 synchronize() 阻塞

vllm_ascend/kv_offload/cpu_npu.py::expand_block_ids(block_ids: np.ndarray, block_size_factor: int, output: np.ndarray, skip_count: int = 0)  # 粗->细粒度 block id 展开，逐 block 独立不要求连续；skip_count 对齐 dst_sub_blocks_to_skip = -src_blocks.size % factor

vllm_ascend/simple_kv_offload/worker.py::SimpleCPUOffloadNPUWorker.register_kv_caches(kv_caches: dict[str, torch.Tensor | tuple | list]) -> None  # 极简路径：重建 [num_blocks, block_bytes] int8 连续 block view + 分配 pinned CPU 镜像；K/V 分开存储须去重
vllm_ascend/simple_kv_offload/copy_backend.py::class NPUDmaCopyBackend  # DMA 直拷后端：init(npu/cpu_caches, load/store_stream) 起后台线程、launch_copy(...) 入 FIFO 队列、_copy_loop 出队收口 copy_blocks、Event 轮询

vllm_ascend/simple_kv_offload/npu_mem_ops.py::build_params(src_caches, dst_caches, direction: int) -> BatchMemcpyParams  # 预建指针/步长描述符(src_bases/dst_bases/bpb/num_sub_tensors/direction)；copy_blocks(src_block_ids, dst_block_ids, params) 在 npu.stream 上下文 base+id*bpb 广播收口 swap_blocks_batch
ch13: vllm_ascend/worker/worker.py::class NPUWorker(WorkerBase)  # 昇腾进程级执行主控，直接派生抽象 WorkerBase 而非继承 GPU Worker；文件头 Adapted from vllm/v1/worker/gpu_worker.py。四步生命周期：init_device / determine_available_memory / compile_or_warm_up_model / execute_model
vllm_ascend/worker/worker.py::NPUWorker.init_device() -> None  # npu set_device + workspace 申请(init_workspace_manager num_ubatches=1，对 GPU 的 2) + HAS_TRITON 时 torch_npu._inductor 初始化 + 建分布式环境(HCCL)
vllm_ascend/worker/worker.py::NPUWorker.determine_available_memory() -> int  # npu memory_profiling + profile_cudagraph_memory 估 ACLGraph 显存(δ)，据此回退建议 gpu-memory-utilization，算出 KV cache 可用字节

vllm_ascend/worker/worker.py::NPUWorker.compile_or_warm_up_model() -> CompilationTimes  # warmup_sizes 降序预热(排除 cudagraph_capture_sizes)，enforce_eager 门控图捕获；_warm_up_atb() 触发 torch_npu._npu_matmul_add_fp32 预热 ATB
vllm_ascend/worker/worker.py::NPUWorker.execute_model(scheduler_output) -> ModelRunnerOutput | None  # 唯一进稳态热路径的方法，每调度拍一次，派发到 NPUModelRunner.execute_model；含 profile_memory()/dp.step() 可选观测钩子
vllm/v1/worker/worker_base.py::class WorkerBase  # 对照基座：硬件无关 Worker 抽象，四步生命周期全 raise NotImplementedError，__init__ 把 vllm_config 摊开成各 config 字段——昇腾对位它重写而非继承 GPU Worker
